Name: Nedbank Mining Finance Bond 2025 – Platinum Tranche A
Description: 7-year mining bond backed by platinum group metal royalty and production tokens from Impala Platinum and Anglo American Platinum in the Bushveld Complex. Coupon: 9.75% p.a. JSE-listed. FSCA-approved.

Name: Nedbank Mining Finance Bond 2025 – Gold Tranche B
Description: 10-year gold mining bond backed by AngloGold Ashanti and Harmony Gold tokenized production royalties. Coupon: 10.00% p.a. JSE-listed. FSCA-approved. SA Reserve Bank registered.

Name: Nedbank Mining Finance Bond 2025 – Coal & Energy Minerals Tranche C
Description: 5-year mining bond for coal extraction and Eskom-supply contracts in Mpumalanga. Backed by coal royalty and MiningLicense tokens. Coupon: 11.50% p.a. JSE-listed. FSCA-approved. Just Transition clause.

Name: Nedbank Mining Finance Bond 2025 – Rehabilitation Tranche D (ESG)
Description: 15-year ESG-linked mining rehabilitation bond backing environmental rehabilitation obligations (EROs) tokenized as RehabilitationBond tokens across SA’s closed mining regions. Coupon: 8.75% p.a. FSCA-approved.

Name: Nedbank Mining Finance Bond 2025 – Iron Ore & Manganese Tranche E
Description: 7-year bond backed by Northern Cape iron ore and Kalahari manganese mineral royalty tokens. Coupon: 10.25% p.a. JSE-listed. FSCA-approved.

Name: SA Manufacturing Industries Bond 2025 – Automotive Tranche A
Description: 5-year bond for South Africa’s automotive and components manufacturing sector. Backed by 68 tokenized factory equipment, tooling and IP assets from NAAMSA-registered manufacturers. Coupon: 10.50% p.a. JSE-listed. FSCA-approved.

Name: SA Manufacturing Industries Bond 2025 – Food & Beverage Tranche B
Description: 3-year bond for food and beverage manufacturers (CGCSA-registered). Backed by 55 tokenized equipment, inventory and property tokens. Coupon: 11.00% p.a. JSE-listed. FSCA-approved.

Name: SA Manufacturing Industries Bond 2025 – Steel & Metal Fabrication Tranche C
Description: 7-year bond for South African steel and metal fabrication sector. Backed by SEIFSA-registered manufacturer equipment tokens and inventory. Coupon: 10.75% p.a. JSE-listed. FSCA-approved.

Name: SA Manufacturing Industries Bond 2025 – Chemicals & Plastics Tranche D
Description: 5-year bond for chemical and plastic products manufacturers (CAIA-registered). Backed by plant, equipment and feedstock inventory tokens. Coupon: 11.25% p.a. JSE-listed. FSCA-approved.

Name: SA Manufacturing Industries Bond 2025 – Textile & Clothing Tranche E (Youth Impact)
Description: 5-year impact bond for youth-owned textile and clothing manufacturers (TCFL sector). Backed by 88 tokenized equipment and inventory assets. Coupon: 10.00% p.a. JSE-listed. FSCA-approved.

Name: Nedbank SME Invoice ETF 2025 – Class A (Mining Suppliers)
Description: ETF backed by 480 invoice tokens from mining sector SME suppliers to major mines. Weighted yield: 14.8% p.a. Monthly liquidity window. JSE Alt-X listed. FSCA-approved. Management fee: 0.70% p.a.

Name: Nedbank SME Invoice ETF 2025 – Class B (Government Contractors)
Description: ETF tracking payment claim tokens from CIDB-registered SME contractors. 320 invoice and payment tokens in basket. Yield: 13.5% p.a. Monthly liquidity. JSE Alt-X listed. Management fee: 0.65% p.a.

Name: Nedbank SME Invoice ETF 2025 – Class C (Agricultural Supply Chain)
Description: ETF tracking invoice tokens from agri-SMEs supplying food processors and exporters. 215 tokens. Weighted yield: 15.2% p.a. Quarterly rebalancing. JSE Alt-X listed. Management fee: 0.75% p.a.

Name: Nedbank SME Invoice ETF 2025 – Class D (Automotive & Engineering)
Description: ETF tracking invoice tokens from automotive and engineering SME suppliers. 168 invoice positions. Weighted yield: 13.8% p.a. JSE Alt-X listed. Management fee: 0.60% p.a.

Name: SA Farmer Revenue Participation Note – Series 1 (Grain)
Description: Revenue-linked note tied to Free State grain farm SAFEX contract proceeds. Investors receive 12% of quarterly settlement revenue. 3-year term. Backed by HarvestForward tokens. FSCA-approved.

Name: SA Farmer Revenue Participation Note – Series 2 (Wine & Horticulture)
Description: Revenue-linked note tied to Boland Wine Estate annual wine and olive oil revenue. Investors receive 18% of annual cellar revenue. 5-year term. FSCA-approved.

Name: SA Mining Revenue Participation Note – Series 3 (Platinum)
Description: Revenue-linked note tied to platinum group metal royalty income from Bushveld Igneous Complex mines. Investors receive 8% of quarterly PGM royalty token receipts. 7-year term. FSCA-approved.

Name: SA SME Revenue Participation Note – Series 4 (Manufacturing)
Description: Revenue-linked note tied to Gauteng manufacturing SME quarterly turnover. Investors receive 10% of revenue. 2-year term. Backed by 38 SMEAsset tokens. FSCA-approved. SEDA-certified.

Name: SA Carbon Credit Revenue Participation Note – Series 5
Description: Revenue-linked note tied to voluntary carbon credit sales from SACOAS-registered projects. Investors receive 15% of annual carbon credit auction revenue. 10-year term. FSCA-approved. CBI-aligned.

Name: SA Agricultural Token ETF – Class A (Grain & Oilseeds)
Description: ETF tracking SAFEX-linked tokenized grain and oilseed farm assets from the Free State, North West and Mpumalanga. 96 farm token positions. Management fee: 0.40% p.a. JSE-listed.

Name: SA Agricultural Token ETF – Class B (Horticulture & Viticulture)
Description: ETF tracking tokenized Limpopo orchard, Western Cape vineyard and KZN subtropical fruit assets. 78 orchard and plantation tokens. Management fee: 0.50% p.a. JSE-listed.

Name: SA Agricultural Token ETF – Class C (Livestock & Dairy)
Description: ETF tracking tokenized livestock herds and dairy farm assets from Eastern Cape, Northern Cape and Free State. 110 livestock token positions. Management fee: 0.45% p.a. JSE-listed.

Name: SA Agri-Food Supply Chain Finance Token – Grain Export SC
Description: Tokenized supply chain finance from Free State grain farms through GrainSA processors to Richards Bay bulk export terminal. 42,000 MT white maize. 90-day revolving facility. FSCA-compliant.

Name: SA Mining Supply Chain Finance Token – PGM Concentrate SC
Description: Supply chain finance covering platinum concentrate transport from Bushveld mines to Eskom smelter and refinery. Revolving 60-day facility. FSCA-compliant. FIC-registered.

Name: SA Manufacturing Supply Chain Finance Token – Automotive SC
Description: Supply chain finance for NAAMSA automotive component manufacturers from raw material procurement to OEM delivery. 120-day revolving facility. FSCA-compliant.
